stemHtml: The disadvantage(s) of a float type fuel quantity measuring system compared to a capacitance fuel measuring system is (are) that the…

options.a: indications are influenced by aircraft attitude variations and accelerations only.
options.b: indications are influenced by aircraft attitude variations, accelerations, and temperature variations.
options.d: indications are influenced by aircraft attitude variations, accelerations, and temperature variations, and the complex design.
